requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容与无线／无线电核准（ICTA）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容與無線／無線電核准（ICTA）

summary.en: Mauritius does NOT use the EU CE marking. There is no CE conformity-marking obligation; instead, electromagnetic compatibility and radio aspects are handled through MSB-adopted MS/IEC standards and, critically, through the Information and Communication Technologies Authority （ICTA）, which is the regulator for radio-frequency apparatus. A plain wired power bank or battery pack with no radio function generally faces no radio-licensing step, but any device with wireless functionality （Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, RFID, wireless charging that radiates） requires ICTA type-approval/authorisation before importation and sale. Mauritius operates on 230 V, 50 Hz; the 50 Hz frequency matches China but the voltage differs from China's 220/380 V, which is relevant for any included AC charger/adapter.
summary.zh: 毛里求斯不使用欧盟CE标志。无CE合格标志义务；电磁兼容与无线电方面转而通过MSB采纳的MS/IEC标准处理，并且关键地通过信息与通信技术管理局（ICTA）处理——ICTA是无线电频率设备的监管机构。无无线功能的有线移动电源或电池组一般无需无线电许可步骤，但任何含无线功能的设备（蓝牙、Wi-Fi、RFID、产生辐射的无线充电）在进口及销售前须取得ICTA型式核准／授权。毛里求斯电网为230 V、50 Hz；50 Hz频率与中国一致，但电压不同于中国的220/380 V，这对任何随附的交流充电器／适配器有影响。
summary.zht: 模里西斯不使用歐盟CE標誌。無CE合格標誌義務；電磁相容與無線電方面轉而透過MSB採納的MS/IEC標準處理，並且關鍵地透過資訊與通訊技術管理局（ICTA）處理——ICTA是無線電頻率設備的監管機構。無無線功能的有線行動電源或電池組一般無需無線電許可步驟，但任何含無線功能的裝置（藍牙、Wi-Fi、RFID、產生輻射的無線充電）在進口及銷售前須取得ICTA型式核准／授權。模里西斯電網為230 V、50 Hz；50 Hz頻率與中國一致，但電壓不同於中國的220/380 V，這對任何隨附的交流充電器／適配器有影響。

standards_or_laws: Information and Communication Technologies Act — ICTA mandate for type-approval/authorisation of radio-frequency apparatus
MS/CISPR / IEC EMC standards adopted by MSB for electromagnetic compatibility
No EU CE marking obligation in Mauritius

summary.en: In China, EMC for electronic products is addressed under GB EMC standards and, for catalogue products, CCC （China Compulsory Certification）; radio-transmitting equipment additionally requires an SRRC （State Radio Regulation of China） type-approval. A Chinese SRRC approval and CCC certificate demonstrate Chinese domestic compliance but are not recognised by ICTA Mauritius — wireless devices must obtain separate ICTA type-approval. There is no CE marking in the Chinese domestic system either; CE is an EU concept not used by either market.
summary.zh: 在中国，电子产品的电磁兼容依据GB EMC标准处理，对目录产品依据CCC（中国强制性产品认证）；无线电发射设备另需SRRC（国家无线电管理）型号核准。中国SRRC核准和CCC证书证明中国国内合规，但不被毛里求斯ICTA认可——无线设备须另行取得ICTA型式核准。中国国内体系同样无CE标志；CE是欧盟概念，两个市场都不使用。
summary.zht: 在中國，電子產品的電磁相容依據GB EMC標準處理，對目錄產品依據CCC（中國強制性產品認證）；無線電發射設備另需SRRC（國家無線電管理）型號核准。中國SRRC核准和CCC證書證明中國國內合規，但不被模里西斯ICTA認可——無線裝置須另行取得ICTA型式核准。中國國內體系同樣無CE標誌；CE是歐盟概念，兩個市場都不使用。

standards_or_laws: GB EMC standard series for electromagnetic compatibility of electronic products
CCC （China Compulsory Certification） for catalogue-listed products
SRRC type-approval （State Radio Regulation of China） for radio-transmitting equipment

gap.en: Two distinct points. （1） CE marking is irrelevant for Mauritius — exporters should not assume an EU CE file substitutes for local requirements, nor is CE required. （2） The live obligation is ICTA type-approval for any wireless-enabled device; a Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer to ICTA. For wired-only power banks, the EMC route is via MSB-adopted MS/IEC standards if the category is inspected. Also account for the 230 V / 50 Hz grid for any bundled AC adapter — the 50 Hz matches China but the 230 V voltage differs from China's 220/380 V, so the adapter rating and plug type （Mauritius commonly uses BS 1363 Type G） must be suitable.
gap.zh: 两个明确要点。（1）CE标志对毛里求斯无意义——出口商不应假定欧盟CE文件可替代当地要求，也无需CE。（2）现行义务是对任何含无线功能设备的ICTA型式核准；中国SRRC核准不可转用于ICTA。对仅有线的移动电源，若类别受检，EMC路径经MSB采纳的MS/IEC标准。还须考虑随附交流适配器的230 V／50 Hz电网——50 Hz与中国一致，但230 V电压不同于中国220/380 V，故适配器额定值与插头类型（毛里求斯常用BS 1363 G型）须适配。
gap.zht: 兩個明確要點。（1）CE標誌對模里西斯無意義——出口商不應假定歐盟CE文件可替代當地要求，也無需CE。（2）現行義務是對任何含無線功能裝置的ICTA型式核准；中國SRRC核准不可轉用於ICTA。對僅有線的行動電源，若類別受檢，EMC路徑經MSB採納的MS/IEC標準。還須考慮隨附交流適配器的230 V／50 Hz電網——50 Hz與中國一致，但230 V電壓不同於中國220/380 V，故適配器額定值與插頭類型（模里西斯常用BS 1363 G型）須適配。

mandatory_status.target: ICTA type-approval mandatory for any wireless-enabled device before import/sale; EMC via MSB-adopted MS/IEC standards where the category is inspected; no EU CE marking obligation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB EMC compliance, CCC for catalogue products, and SRRC type-approval for radio-transmitting equipment

source.publisher: Information and Communication Technologies Authority （ICTA）, Mauritius

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mauritius does not use EU CE marking. Wired-only battery packs handle EMC through MSB-adopted MS/IEC standards where inspected, while any wireless-enabled device requires ICTA type-approval — a Chinese SRRC approval or CCC certificate does not transfer. Confirm with ICTA whether the device needs radio authorisation, and ensure any bundled AC adapter suits the 230 V / 50 Hz grid and local plug type. These are informational pointers, not a conformity determination.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 毛里求斯不使用欧盟CE标志。仅有线电池组在受检时经MSB采纳的MS/IEC标准处理EMC，而任何含无线功能设备须取得ICTA型式核准——中国SRRC核准或CCC证书不可转用。请向ICTA确认设备是否需要无线电授权，并确保随附交流适配器适配230 V／50 Hz电网及当地插头类型。以上为参考指引，非合格评定结论。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 模里西斯不使用歐盟CE標誌。僅有線電池組在受檢時經MSB採納的MS/IEC標準處理EMC，而任何含無線功能裝置須取得ICTA型式核准——中國SRRC核准或CCC證書不可轉用。請向ICTA確認裝置是否需要無線電授權，並確保隨附交流適配器適配230 V／50 Hz電網及當地插頭類型。以上為參考指引，非合格評定結論。
